beIN SPORTS 1.title: Arsenal vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against in the Atlético Madrid in the UEFA Champions League, winning 4-0 at the Emirates and drawing 1-1 at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano Stadium this season. Only two other managers have gone unbeaten in their first three games against Atlético boss Diego Simeone in the competition: Carlo Ancelotti and Maurizio Sarri. Winless in their two games against Arsenal this season, Atlético Madrid last faced an opponent 3+ times in a single campaign without managing a victory in 2022-23, versus Real Madrid.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Bayern München vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Bayern München vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Paris SG 5-4 Bayern Munich in the first leg was the highest scoring European Cup semi-final match since Eintracht Frankfurt beat Rangers 6-3 in 1959-60. Across both legs, in major European competition the most goals in any semi-final was in that Frankfurt – Rangers tie, which ended 12-4 on aggregate to the German side. In UEFA Champions League history, only one team has ever scored five goals in a knockout match and then been eliminated in that tie, which was Manchester City against Monaco in the last 16 in 2016-17.

beIN SPORTS XTRA 1.desc: Ligue 2 is the second division of French football. Ligue 2 is contested by 18 clubs, the league operates on a system of promotion and relegation with both Ligue 1 and the third division Championnat National. The teams play 34 games each, totaling 306 games in the season. The biggest games from each match Day are live and exclusive on beIN.

beIN SPORTS 3.title: Elche vs Deportivo Alavés - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Elche have won two and lost three of their five LaLiga matches against Alavés; only against Rayo Vallecano  have they played more top-flight matches without recording a single draw. At home, Elche have won four of their last seven matches in all competitions against Alavés, having lost their previous three such meetings.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Sevilla vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Sevilla vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Sevilla lost their last LaLiga meeting with Espanyol 2-1 in the reverse fixture this season, ending a 12-game unbeaten run against them ; they could now suffer a league double against the Periquitos for the fourth time in their history, having previously done so in 1943/44, 1948/49 and 1965/66. Sevilla are unbeaten in their last 12 home LaLiga games against Espanyol, since a 1-2 defeat in January 2011; if they score in this match, they will record their longest scoring streak at home against them in the top flight.

beIN SPORTS 3.title: Atlético Madrid vs Celta Vigo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Atlético de Madrid are unbeaten in their last 14 LaLiga matches against Celta de Vigo, their longest ever unbeaten run against the Galicians in the competition. At home, Atlético de Madrid have avoided defeat in their last 13 LaLiga matches against Celta de Vigo, having lost four of their previous five ; since 2014/15, they have only drawn more home games in the competition against Villarreal and Real Madrid  than against Celta.

beIN SPORTS 3.title: Freiburg vs Sporting Braga - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Freiburg remain winless against Portuguese opponents in European competition. Should they fail to win here, they will have played more European games  against sides from Portugal without managing a victory than against teams from any other nation. Braga hold a 2-1 lead from the first leg of this tie against Freiburg; however, each of the last three Portuguese sides to win the first leg of a UEFA Europa League tie beyond the round of 16 have still failed to progress.
